role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and road infrastructure style.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Cryptomeria) and forest structure.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed guardrail type (W-beam) and road width.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Japan. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (specifically regarding the guardrail and vegetation), and the tournament logic correctly prioritized the strongest evidence to defeat the closest competitor (South Korea).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of the steep slope, retaining wall, and guardrail match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of the dense forest and coniferous mix are consistent with the visual data.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: The W-beam guardrail is clearly visible and correctly identified.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: The camera blur and image quality are accurately described.
